label: Weight Loss
short_description: Reduce body weight with steady cardio-focused training and repeatable weekly structure.
review_notes: Includes two cardio days and two full body workout days before one rest day.

label: Lean and Toned
short_description: Build a leaner and more defined shape through balanced training cardio and mobility.
review_notes: Balances three strength-focused days with one cardio day and one stretching day.

label: General Fitness
short_description: Improve daily energy baseline strength and weekly exercise consistency.
review_notes: Uses a simple repeatable structure with full body training cardio stretching and rest.

label: Athletic Body
short_description: Develop a more performance-oriented physique with conditioning agility and core support.
review_notes: Includes full body legs cardio core and stretching to support athletic movement quality.

label: Muscle Gain
short_description: Increase muscle mass with beginner-friendly split training and recovery spacing.
review_notes: Uses more separate muscle-group days with two weekly rest days.

label: Strength Focus
short_description: Build foundational strength through compound movement categories and controlled recovery.
review_notes: Emphasizes legs chest back and shoulders with rest days between heavier sessions.
